name: moos-ivp-skills
description: MOOS-IvP skills for apps, behaviors, missions, CI harnesses, documentation, and alog analysis.

interface.longDescription: Portable skills for building MOOS apps, IvP behaviors, ordinary missions, self-evaluating missions, regression harnesses, documentation-backed answers, and alog analysis.
defaultPrompt: Use MOOS-IvP skills to build or repair this MOOS app.
Use MOOS-IvP skills to create a self-evaluating mission harness.
Use MOOS-IvP skills to analyze this .alog mission run.
